sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f methodology applied via inverse matrix algebra across multiple instruments. Expected returns (E) and weight sum constraint (S) solve for optimal portfolio weightings. Specific numeric values not provided in excerpt—requires expected return inputs to calculate actual position sizes.

source_rule_text: Determine optimal portfolio weightings by solving a system of linear equations using matrix algebra with expected return (E) and sum of weights constraint (S) as inputs.
